# Notifiable Data Breaches Scheme

Jurisdiction: Australia
Region: AU
Citation: Notifiable Data Breaches scheme
Authority: Office of the Australian Information Commissioner
Source URL: https://www.oaic.gov.au/privacy/notifiable-data-breaches
Topics: security_breach, notice_transparency, accountability
Keywords: Notifiable Data Breaches, NDB scheme, eligible data breach, OAIC

## Summary
Australian breach-notification scheme requiring notification of eligible data breaches under the Privacy Act.

## Key compliance obligations
- Assess suspected breaches for likely serious harm.
- Notify OAIC and affected individuals for eligible breaches.
- Maintain incident response and evidence records.
